CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Continued To Aug-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Hearing On Final Report Of Receiver And Application For Discharge Of Receiver; And Exoneration Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS, INC. Notice of Hearing on Final Report of Receiver and Application for Discharge of Receiver; And Exoneration Of Bond. Appearances: Mark J. Romeo, Esq. (415) 395-9315, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. Counsel gave notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion Granted. Moving party has explained service upon Attorney Michael Heath as requested by the Court. E-mail from Mr. Heath presented to the Court confirms that he represents Mr. Muhawieh. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Plaintiff Trust Deed Investments, Inc.'S Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Trust Deed Investments, Inc.'s Order to Show Cause regarding confirmation of appointment of Receiver and Issuance of Preliminary Injunction. Mark J. Romeo, Esq. Law Offices of Mark J. Romeo, (415) 395-9315; There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order confirming appointment of receiver; and preliminary injunction signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
